steps.title: Find the decisive signal
steps.content: Robots have "unnatural aspects" in their appearance that hinder interaction, and the features should help counteract these aspects.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "unusual / deviates from the expected pattern" — the research shows democratic institutions restrain inflation, but Belgium (strong institutions) had higher inflation than Equatorial Guinea (weak institutions). Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — inexplicable: impossible to explain — too strong; the result is unusual but the passage explains it exists without saying it is beyond explanation. ✗
  • Choice B — unfounded: lacking evidence — the result is a real measured data point, so "unfounded" does not apply. ✗
  • Choice C — facetious: treating something serious as a joke — the data is presented earnestly, not humorously. ✗
  • Choice D — anomalous: deviating from what is standard or expected — the result contradicts the general trend, making it an outlier. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
